title: Top2 Inhibitor Sensitivity Assay
author: Jacob G Kirkland
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k5zcy76

steps.title: Plate (2) 6cm dishes at 25% confluency (approx
steps.instruction: Plate (2) 6cm dishes at 25% confluency (approx. 500K cells). Let attach overnight

steps.title: Add 1000x Doxycyclin to 1 plate...
steps.instruction: Add 1000x Doxycyclin to 1 plate of cells with fresh media and induce for 72 hours changing media with fresh doxycyclin daily. Also change media to corresponding non-induced plate 72:00:00

steps.title: Split cells at density appropriate for cell type
steps.instruction: Split cells at density appropriate for cell type. (eg. 5000k cells/well) in total of 150ul of media per well. Make master mixes of cells/well in 50ml conicals and distribute using multi-channel pipette. Add doxyxyclin to induced samples at 500x Let cells attach overnight 14:00:00

steps.title: Dilute Top2i in media 96-well round...
steps.instruction: Dilute Top2i in media 96-well round bottom plate for transfer to plates with cells Dilution in media without Doxycycline so that both cell samples can get Top2i from the same dilutions In our case 2ul of stock concentration of drug (see making stock plate) in 250ul of media (1:125) --> (1:500 when 50uls is added to 150ul already in well. Doxycycline concentration will be diluted in induced samples but was starting with a higher concentration). One row is enough for 1/2 plate. Make multiple rows of dilutions for more plates.

steps.title: 48:00:00 Incubate cells with Top2i for 2 days
steps.instruction: 48:00:00 Incubate cells with Top2i for 2 days

steps.title: Dilute cell titer blue 1:2 in...
steps.instruction: Dilute cell titer blue 1:2 in PBS Add 20ul of cell titer blue to wells and let sit overnight 14:00:00

steps.title: Transfer suppernatant to 384-well black plates...
steps.instruction: Transfer suppernatant to 384-well black plates for reading Excite at 544nm and emission of 590nm
